description_long: This helmet features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly matte black surface accented by bold, angular red stripes and highlights. The front is dominated by a large, silver-tinted full-face visor that provides extensive facial coverage and a futuristic appearance. Distinctive geometric elements, such as rectangular and circular protrusions, are integrated into the sides, possibly for communication or audio equipment. The helmet's surface is smooth with subtle panel lines and layered segments, enhancing its high-tech, urban aesthetic. The rear and top are streamlined, with a single red stripe running from front to back, emphasizing its aerodynamic profile. No visible brand logos or text are present, and the helmet appears robust and well-constructed for personal protection in urban environments.
description: A matte black helmet with bold red accents, a large silver full-face visor, and geometric side elements, giving it a futuristic, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large silver visor, central red stripe, and angular cheek and chin guards.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the circular red and black ear section and layered side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back with a single red stripe running down the center.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ear section and geometric side detailing.
attribute_graphic_design: Matte black base with bold red stripes and accents in a geometric, modern style; no text or imagery.
